serversPage.title: Servers

empty.title: No servers registered
empty.description: Add your first CS2 server to get started with the tournament

allocation.title: Server allocation
allocation.cooldownDescription: Recently finished a match – in cooldown so demos can upload and the server can fully reset (about 2 minutes).

ipBanned.title: Server May Have Banned Our IP
ipBanned.message: Server is reachable but repeatedly rejecting RCON authentication. This may indicate an IP ban. If the RCON password is correct, please check the server's ban list and unban our IP address.

errors.noMatchesForServer: No matches found for this server
errors.loadCurrentMatch: Failed to load current match for this server
errors.bulkDelete: Failed to delete one or more servers

bulkDelete.title: Delete Servers
bulkDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} server{{suffix}}? This action cannot be undone.

autoConfig.configuring: Configuring new servers (sending MatchZy config via RCON)…

serversPage.checkServerLogs: Check the game server console/logs to see if MatchZy receives config and sends events.

serverModal.rconPasswordHelper: Password for RCON access to the server
serverModal.enabledHelper: Disabled servers won't be used for matches
serverModal.overridesDescription: These settings override the global MatchZy defaults for this server only. Leave blank to use global values from Settings.
serverModal.knifeOverrideHelper: When set, overrides matchzy_knife_enabled_default for this server. Leave in indeterminate state to use global default.

errors.portInvalid: Port must be a valid number between 1 and 65535
errors.idGenerationFailed: Unable to generate server ID. Please adjust the server name.
errors.duplicateId: Server name creates duplicate ID '{{id}}'. Choose a different name.
errors.duplicateHostPort: A server with host:port '{{host}}:{{port}}' already exists (ID: {{id}}, Name: {{name}})
errors.testConnectionSaveFirst: Save the server first before testing connection
errors.rconReachableApiUnreachable: We can reach the server via RCON, but the server could not reach the API endpoint (test event missing).
errors.serverOffline: Server appears offline or unreachable via RCON.

success.connectivityOk: Bi-directional connectivity verified: server is online and can reach the API.

confirmDelete.title: Delete Server
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

adminToolsPage.title: Admin Tools
adminToolsPage.description: Run common match and server actions across your CS2 servers. Quick actions are shown first, with more advanced tools available below.
adminToolsPage.noServers: No enabled servers found. Please add and enable servers in the Servers page.

recovery.title: Match Recovery
recovery.description: If the API or servers were restarted during a tournament and match state looks out of sync (e.g. matches stuck in warmup or missing live scores), you can manually trigger a recovery pass. This will ask all servers for their current match report, resync scores/phases, and reconfigure webhooks and demo uploads where possible.
recovery.failedTrigger: Failed to trigger match recovery. Please try again.
